report_name: DragonForce Ransomware Targets Chicago Tour Company in Double Extortion Attack

threat_actors.name: DragonForce
threat_actors.description: A ransomware group that conducted a double extortion attack against Shoreline Sightseeing, threatening to leak stolen data on its dark web leak site.
threat_actors.goals: To extort a ransom from Shoreline Sightseeing by encrypting their data and threatening to leak it.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: DragonForce encrypted files on Shoreline Sightseeing's network as part of a double extortion ransomware attack.

attack_patterns.name: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
attack_patterns.description: DragonForce exfiltrated data from Shoreline Sightseeing's network to hold for ransom as part of a double extortion scheme. The article suggests this data is typically moved to cloud storage.

malware.name: DragonForce Ransomware
malware.description: The ransomware used by the DragonForce group to encrypt victim files and facilitate data exfiltration in a double extortion scheme against Shoreline Sightseeing.

identities.name: Shoreline Sightseeing
identities.description: A Chicago-based boat tour and water taxi company targeted by the DragonForce ransomware group in a double extortion attack.

infrastructure.name: DragonForce Leak Site
infrastructure.description: The dark web data leak site used by the DragonForce ransomware group to publish threats and exfiltrated data from victims like Shoreline Sightseeing.

indicators.name: Active Directory Reconnaissance for Ransomware
indicators.pattern:
title: Active Directory Reconnaissance for Ransomware
id: 2b8c1f9a-7e4d-4b1c-8d5a-9f3b2a1c0d9e
status: experimental
description: Detects execution of commands commonly used by ransomware operators for Active Directory reconnaissance.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/dragonforce-ransomware-attack-on-shoreline-sightseeing/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-01
tags:
  - attack.t1087.002
  - attack.discovery
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_nltest:
    Image|endswith: '\nltest.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '/dclist'
  selection_net:
    Image|endswith: '\net.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'group "Domain Admins"'
  condition: 1 of them
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative activity.
indicators.description: Detects command-line patterns for Active Directory reconnaissance, a common precursor to ransomware deployment.

indicators.name: Cloud Storage CLI for Data Exfiltration
indicators.pattern:
title: Cloud Storage CLI for Data Exfiltration
id: 5d1e2f3a-4b5c-4d6e-7f8a-9b0c1d2e3f4a
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of legitimate cloud storage command-line tools often abused by ransomware groups for data exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/dragonforce-ransomware-attack-on-shoreline-sightseeing/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-01
tags:
  - attack.t1537
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\rclone.exe'
      - '\megacmd.exe'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of these tools for backup or data transfer.
indicators.description: Detects the execution of rclone.exe or megacmd.exe, which are frequently used by threat actors for data exfiltration.

indicators.name: Data Staging with Common Archive Utilities
indicators.pattern:
title: Data Staging with Common Archive Utilities
id: 8a9b0c1d-2e3f-4a5b-6c7d-8e9f0a1b2c3d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of large archive files on servers, which often precedes data exfiltration in ransomware attacks.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/dragonforce-ransomware-attack-on-shoreline-sightseeing/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-01
tags:
  - attack.t1560.001
  - attack.collection
level: low
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.zip'
      - '.rar'
      - '.7z'
  filter_legit_paths:
    TargetFilename|startswith:
      - 'C:\Users\'
      - 'C:\Windows\Temp\'
  condition: selection and not filter_legit_paths
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate software updates or user activity.
indicators.description: Detects the creation of large archive files (.zip, .7z, .rar) on servers, a common data staging technique before exfiltration.

relationships.source_name: Cloud Storage CLI for Data Exfiltration
Data Staging with Common Archive Utilities
